entryRules.primaryTrigger: No trade. Wait for regime clarity. Composite score is in the neutral zone (-0.1 to +0.09).
entryRules.confirmation: Monitor for composite score to break above +0.1 (bullish) or below -0.1 (bearish) before entering.

invalidation: If BTC dominance rises above 60.3% within 48h, this altcoin setup is invalidated (capital rotating to BTC).
If Fear & Greed Index drops below 25 (currently 48), bullish thesis is invalidated.
If price closes below $2,352.87 (3% below nearest support), exit immediately.
If RSI(14) drops below 30 and MACD crosses bearish, regime has shifted.
If funding rate exceeds 0.05% (extreme greed in leverage), reduce position by 50%.

backtestParameters.benchmark: BTC total return over same period
